zh.Mettingham, Waveney District, Suffolk, E: 英國英格蘭素福爾可梅廷加姆
zh.Eresby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Willoughby 6th Baron於大約1385年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親William Willoughby15歲，母親Lucy le Strange19歲。他於1421年2月21日之前與Elizabeth Montagu結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年7月25日在英國享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可梅廷加姆。

zh-hans.Eresby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Willoughby 6th Baron于大约1385年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲William Willoughby15岁，母亲Lucy le Strange19岁。他于1421年2月21日之前与Elizabeth Montagu结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1452年7月25日在英国享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可梅廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Willoughby 6th Baron was born about 1385, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, William Willoughby, was 15 and his mother, Lucy le Strange, was 19. He married Elizabeth Montagu before 21 February 1421. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 25 July 1452, in England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Mettingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Willoughby 6th Baron est né environ 1385, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William Willoughby, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lucy le Strange, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Montagu avant 21 février 1421. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1452, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Mettingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Willoughby 6th Baron um 1385 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Willoughby 15 und seine Mutter Lucy le Strange 19. Er hat vor 21. Februar 1421 Elizabeth Montagu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Juli 1452 im Alter von 68 Jahren in England und wurde in Mettingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Willoughby 6th Baron è nato il circa 1385 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, William Willoughby, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Lucy le Strange, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Montagu prima del 21 febbraio 1421. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 luglio 1452, nel England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Mettingham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Willoughby 6th Baronが約1385年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Willoughbyは15歳，母Lucy le Strangeは19歳であった。1421年2月21日以前にElizabeth Montaguと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年7月25日にイギリスで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクメッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Willoughby 6th Baron(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Willoughby(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy le Strange(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1421년 2월 21일 이전 Elizabeth Montagu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 7월 25일 영국에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 멧틴그함에 묻혔다.

mn.Mettingham, Waveney District, Suffolk, E: Mettingham, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Willoughby 6th Baron nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Willoughby, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lucy le Strange, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Montagu antes 21 de fevereiro de 1421. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1452, em Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Willoughby 6th Baron родился около 1385 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Willoughby было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy le Strange, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Montagu перед 21 февраль 1421 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 25 июля 1452 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности меттингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Willoughby 6th Baron nació aproximadamente 1385, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Willoughby, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Lucy le Strange, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Montagu antes de 21 de febrero de 1421. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 25 de julio de 1452, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
